subject: Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor trigger 743953682/240729575 is not a GRB
body:
V Sharma (NASA GSFC/UMBC) reports on behalf of the Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor Team:

"The Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor (GBM) trigger 743953682/240729575 at 13:47:57.48 UT
on 29 July 2024, tentatively classified as a GRB, is in fact not due
to a GRB. This trigger is likely due to SAA exit."
